# CMakeLists.txt for protobuf (source build)
# This file is a placeholder.
# Protobuf has its own CMake build system (in its 'cmake' subdirectory).

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
project(wazuh_ext_protobuf NONE)

message(STATUS "This CMakeLists.txt (src/engine/external/protobuf/CMakeLists.txt) is a placeholder. Protobuf's own CMake script (in ./cmake) is used directly.")
